theme_note: Flickering jurisdictional grids collapse into held static; dense arbitration loops without resolution
events:
A hand reaches for the thermostat while the house splits open.

Everything is reviewed on a case-by-case basis, which means nothing is certain and everything is permitted.

The body stretches toward stillness in a room surrounded by sirens.

Cold pushes north into south, money floats above its own gravity, and someone draws a circle around who belongs.

A small crew loops the dead rock one more time, rehearsing wonder against the hum of slow collapse.
context_felt:
A jaw clenches around something too large to swallow — the belly full, the hunger still screaming.

Two pressures face each other across a taut wire, each one a mirror flooded with light it cannot hold.

The warm air thickens like a held breath before a door opens onto stone.
